summary: Iteration 9 — capture qualification workspace (scoring engine + 19-col Federal Opportunities table + drawer + profile). Backend: 10/10 pytest cases PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_capture_qualification.py against the preview build (QA Verification Org). Confirms GET returns fully decorated rows (eligibility {status,gates}, fitComputed {score,effective,band,confidence,7-cat breakdown}, pwinView, financials, priority A/B/C/Watch/Pass, redFlags, daysRemaining); PUT accepts every new capture field (scopeSummary/tags/oppType/acqStage/recompete/dueTime/psc/naicsTitle/sizeStandard/valueType/addressableValue/contractType/awardsCount/vehicleAccess/pursuitRole/incumbent/competition/capture/watch) and re-decorates the response; scoring reacts correctly (vehicleAccess=need → Ineligible + Pass with red flag; watch=true → Watch (or Pass when gated); decision.call=No-Bid → Pass; pwin=70 → pwinView.band=High; capture.fitOverride=90 → fitComputed.effective=90 + override block); PUT /profile persists vehicles/noGo/prefRole; POST + DELETE clean; no _id leakage. Frontend playwright verified end-to-end: login flow (dismisses cookie banner then submits), /opportunities loads with 8 QA rows, all row-cell testids (priority/fit/elig/pwin/due/flag/watch) + all header sort testids present, drawer opens with ALL 7 sections (drawer-overview/fit/gates/competition/financials/capture/sources), inputs hydrate correctly (owner='QA Auto-Test Owner', next-action='Automated regression check', addressable='777000', fit-override='90', note='QA justification for override'), fit-override validation blocks save without rationale (toast: 'A manual Fit override requires a rationale.'), successful override then shows Fit column = '90 Strong*', watch star toggles and watch-only filter narrows to exactly 1 row, priority filter (Pass) narrows table correctly (8 rows because all Ineligible), column chooser opens with col-toggle-naicsPsc + view-compact + view-default working, multi-sort (click sort-fit + shift-click sort-due) works, select-{id} shows bulk-bar, CSV export triggers download ('QA_Verification_Org_opportunities_2026-07-11.csv'), Profile page shows profile-vehicles/profile-pref-role/profile-nogo populated after PUT ('GSA MAS, SeaPort-NxG' / 'Prime' / 'janitorial, construction'), OpportunityDetail workspace loads with all 6 tabs (tab-fit-overview/set-aside/compliance/budget/scorecard/decision) rendering, Dashboard + Proposals + Competitive Analysis pages load with no console errors. Cleanup: watch/capture/override cleared on QA Opp 1; addressableValue left at $777K (drawer intentionally deletes field on empty→null); test opportunity created & deleted; no AI-cost endpoints (verify/enrich/pull-sam) were invoked.

issues: React 'uncontrolled → controlled input' console warning when the drawer opens; fitOverride is initialized to "" but toggles between empty string and number on typing. Harmless UX but should be quieted by defaulting to "" consistently or using String(...) in the initial useState. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional (low priority): silence the 'uncontrolled → controlled input' React warning in OppDrawer by coercing all numeric fields to String() in the useEffect initializer (currently only fitOverride/addressableValue trigger it — cosmetic, not functional).

Optional cleanup: the drawer's save handler deletes addressableValue from the PUT body when the user clears the field (body.addressableValue == null → delete), so users cannot reset a stated value back to null via the UI. If that is intentional keep as-is; if not, send explicit null.
critical_code_review_comments: scoring.decorate() cleanly separates elig/fit/pwin/priority and never blends PWin into Fit — correct per the design brief. Priority.label ordering (Ineligible-Pass > No-Bid-Pass > noGo-Pass > watch-Watch > band-based) is deterministic and unit-testable.
opportunities.UPDATE_COLUMNS whitelist matches OpportunityUpdate pydantic model 1:1 for the new fields — no silent field drops. Confirmed by PUT-then-GET persistence tests for every new column.

opportunities._decorate() passes ctx['org'] on list/create/get but NOT on update (line 211 — `_decorate(fresh, profile)` omits org). Impact: Capability-match fit scoring can lose the org.keywords / org.naics fallback signal ONLY on the response of a PUT (subsequent GETs still decorate correctly). Low priority since the frontend always re-fetches the row into state on save; consider passing ctx['org'] for consistency.

OppDrawer.save() converts addressableValue='' to null then deletes the key — makes it impossible to clear a stored value via the UI. Consider sending explicit null with an ACCEPT_NULL flag or a 'Clear' button.
scoring.eligibility_gates() correctly stops the fit score from concealing a hard-gate fail via priority_view; a set-aside 'unknown' verdict flows to Eligibility.status='Unknown' as intended.

genai.extract_json + pause_turn fix from iter 8 continues to hold; verify + enrich endpoints not re-hit here (per cost constraint) but the response contract they populate (aiEnrichment.requirementMatches) is consumed by fit_score() lines 148-158 correctly (weighted mandatory-gap accounting).

Nit: /api/orgs/{orgId}/opportunities/verify does not filter on the URL orgId — it uses ctx['org_id'] from the auth cookie only; the {orgId} path param is decorative. Not a security issue (require_role guards it) but the router path param is unused and could mislead. Same for /pull and /enrich.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of review-request testids and flows verified

test_credentials: qa.captureagent@testmail.dev / CaptureQA#2026 — owner of QA Verification Org (499e35c6-ca12-4589-aa1a-ae22bdb72c07)
seed_data_creation: During the run, ONE scratch opportunity was created (TEST_iter9_qualification_target) and DELETED via fixture teardown; a second (TEST_iter9_crud) was also created + deleted. QA Verification Org profile was updated to have vehicles=['GSA MAS','SeaPort-NxG'], noGo='janitorial, construction', prefRole='Prime' (per review-request the QA org profile is fair game). samActive was NOT changed — remains false (intentional so the Ineligible+SAM gate path is exercised). QA Opp 1 (4c53f890-...) capture/override/watch fields were cleaned back to defaults; addressableValue remains 777000 (UI cannot reset to null — see action_items).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_capture_qualification.py auto-creates + deletes its own scratch opp per-run — safe to re-execute. Total wall time ~62s. The QA Verification Org profile now has vehicles + noGo + prefRole populated from this run; if you need to test the empty-profile path revert them. Frontend testids to reuse (all verified live): opportunities-table, opp-row-{id}, priority-{id}, fit-{id}, elig-{id}, pwin-{id}, due-{id}, flag-{id}, watch-{id}, sort-{priority,fit,eligibility,pwin,due}, opp-drawer, drawer-{overview,fit,gates,competition,financials,capture,sources}, capture-owner, next-action, next-action-due, bid-decision, addressable-input, fit-override, fit-override-note, drawer-save, drawer-close, drawer-watch, open-workspace, filter-{priority,eligibility,fit,pwin,decision,status,agency,vehicle,setaside,stage,award,due}, opp-search, watch-only, hide-closed, columns-button, column-chooser, col-toggle-{key} (e.g. naicsPsc), view-compact, view-default, save-view, bulk-bar, bulk-stage, bulk-owner, bulk-watch, bulk-export, bulk-delete, select-{id}, select-all, export-csv, profile-vehicles, profile-pref-role, profile-nogo, tab-{fit-overview,set-aside,compliance,budget,scorecard,decision}. CRITICAL cost note honored: verify_refresh / enrich / pull_sam_grants NEVER invoked live — only their contract shape validated indirectly via scoring.decorate().
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failing scenarios. The initial Playwright login-page timeout was traced to the CookieConsent banner (fixed-position, z-40) covering the sign-in button on first visit; solution is to click [data-testid=cookie-dismiss] before login (documented in context_for_next_testing_agent). This is user-visible on real browsers too but harmless (real users click Dismiss/Got it once and the choice persists via localStorage).
